</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Aripiprazole 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Aripiprazole Accord is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia in adults and in adolescents aged 15 years and older. Aripiprazole Accord is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>bipolar disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>autism spectrum disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（99.6%）</li>
<li>autism susceptibility 1（99.6%）</li>
<li>gaze palsy, familial horizontal, with progressive scoliosis（99.6%）</li>
<li>schizophrenia（99.6%）</li>
<li>asperger syndrome, susceptibility to（99.5%）</li>
<li>Phelan-McDermid syndrome（99.4%）</li>
<li>amelocerebrohypohidrotic syndrome（99.3%）</li>
<li>distal 17p13.3 microdeletion syndrome（99.3%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（99.3%）</li>
<li>Malan overgrowth syndrome（99.3%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（99.2%）</li>
<li>hydranencephaly (disease)（99.2%）</li>
<li>congenital disorder of glycosylation with defective fucosylation（99.2%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（99.0%）</li>
<li>myopia X-linked（99.0%）</li>
<li>syndromic myopia（99.0%）</li>
<li>myopia 26, X-linked, female-limited（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
